ImageOptimizer_OptimizationModesDescript: Limit of 100 preview images per mod. Excess will be skipped.
SettingsPage_OptimizePreviews_Descriptio: Optimize mod preview images for better performance
ImageOptimizer_ManualMode_Description: Optimizes all mod and category images. Converts to JPEG, generates minitile.jpg for mods and catprev.jpg/catmini.jpg for categories. Missing thumbnails are created from existing preview files.
ImageOptimizer_DragDropMod_Description: Dragging and dropping single or multiple images onto a mod tile will run optimization and create mod thumbnail.
ImageOptimizer_DragDropCategory_Descript: Dragging and dropping an image onto a category tile always enables Inspect and Edit mode because it must be cropped appropriately for catprev (722×722 square) and catmini (600×722 rectangle).
ImageOptimizer_AutoDownload_Description: Images downloaded from GameBanana are automatically optimized. Converts to JPEG and generates thumbnails (minitile.jpg for mods).
ImageOptimizer_ThreadCount_Description: More threads = faster processing ({0} logical cores detected)
ImageOptimizer_CreateBackups_Description: Creates a ZIP archive with original files (preview_backup_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.zip)
ImageOptimizer_KeepOriginals_Description: Original files will not be deleted (e.g., preview.png remains alongside preview.jpg)
SettingsPage_ImageCropType_Description: Choose the cropping method for mod thumbnails
SettingsPage_PreviewBeforeCrop_Descripti: Enable cropping and frame editing before optimization
SettingsPage_AutoCreateModThumbnails_Des: Skip manual selection and cropping for mod thumbnails, use first preview with selected crop mode
ImageOptimizer_Reoptimize_Description: Re-optimize files that already have correct names (catprev, catmini, minitile, preview-01, preview-02, etc.)
ImageOptimizer_ScreenshotDirectory_Descr: Directory to monitor for new screenshots during capture mode
